macro.title: Why it will be hard to get mortgage rates over 7%
macro.what: The 10-year yield touched 4.60% on Iran headlines, but tighter spreads and a 6.50% to 6.75% base keep 7% less likely.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Reverse mortgages emerge as a tool in ‘gray divorce’ settlements
macro.what: Gray divorce rates doubled from 1990 to 2010, and reverse mortgages can fund equity buyouts for homeowners ages 62 or older.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Visionary Homes names former Oakwood exec Ryan Smith CEO
housing.what: Visionary Homes, one of Utah’s largest privately held homebuilders, appointed Ryan Smith as CEO effective Sept
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: CFPB seeks input on mortgage disclosures and TRID rules
housing.what: CFPB issued an RFI on TRID, refinance rescission and reverse mortgage disclosures, asking if current rules raise costs and limit access.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: There Are Now Only 5 Major Metros Where A Typical Luxury Home Costs Less Than $1 Million
housing.what: The number of major metros where you can buy a luxury home for less than $1 million is down five from eight last year
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Luxury Homes Cost 9 Times More Than the Typical Homes in These South Florida “Wealth Magnet” Metros
housing.what: West Palm Beach, FL, where the typical luxury home costs 8.9 times more than the typical non luxury home, has the nation’s biggest luxury home price premium
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: Sotheby’s International Realty acquires Majestic Realty Collective

notables.title: Unlock agrees to restitution, compliance with Colorado laws on home equity agreements
notables.what: Colorado AG gets Unlock to treat its home equity agreements as consumer loans, repay $283K to homeowners and comply with state lending laws.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Former FHA Commissioner Frank Cassidy returns to Walker & Dunlop
notables.what: Frank Cassidy rejoined Walker & Dunlop after resigning from HUD, where he oversaw FHA’s $2 trillion portfolio and cut multifamily MIP.
